patterns.title: Repo Analyst
patterns.description: Inspect a repository, build a grounded summary, and keep raw file contents behind tool-result refs.

patterns.title: Test Runner
patterns.description: Run project tests through policy-gated shell execution and produce concise failure diagnostics.

patterns.title: Research Agent
patterns.description: Separate sourced evidence from synthesis so external content remains untrusted context.

patterns.title: Tool Designer
patterns.description: Turn a tool request into schema, permissions, risk, output envelope, trace, and tests.

patterns.title: Memory Curator
patterns.description: Promote durable memory only when it is scoped, sourced, non-secret, and useful for future runs.
